# TurnTurnTurn

Lightweight hub runtime for routing, enriching, and preserving provenance over sequential work items.

## Key files
- README.md — overview and quick start
- docs/ttt_architecture_v0_15.md — full architecture
- src/turnturnturn/hub.py — TTT hub runtime (start_turn, register_purpose)
- src/turnturnturn/cto.py — CTO and content profile validation
- src/turnturnturn/protocols.py — PurposeProtocol, TurnTakerProtocol
